title: Stocks Set to Open Higher as Chipmakers Rebound, Corporate Earnings in Focus
excerpt: September S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESU26) are up +0.30%, and September Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQU26) are up +0.59% this morning, buoyed by a mild rebound...
content_html:
Oleksandr Pylypenko

Mon, July 20, 2026 at 4:32 AM MDT 9 min read

September S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESU26) are up +0.30%, and September Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQU26) are up +0.59% this morning, buoyed by a mild rebound in chip stocks at the start of an earnings-packed week.

Chip stocks advanced in pre-market trading as investors stepped in to buy the dip following a rout that pushed the high-profile group into a bear market. Micron Technology (MU) was up over +4%, Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) was up more than +2%, and Marvell Technology (MRVL) was up about +2%.

More News from Barchart

  • Alibaba Stock Just Got Apple's Biggest AI Endorsement. This Could Be a Game Changer for BABA.

  • Elon Musk Says If SpaceX Accomplishes Its Goals, 'It Will Be Worth More Than The Rest of Earth' — Though He's Also Said 'Money Will Stop Being Relevant'

  • AI Bubble Fears, Earnings and Other Can't Miss Items this Week

  • Tired of missing midday reversals? The FREE Barchart Brief newsletter keeps you in the know. Sign up now!

Also aiding sentiment, the price of WTI crude erased earlier gains and fell on Monday after Iran said it was still pursuing a diplomatic solution and that it had received proposals from mediators. Oil prices initially jumped after the U.S. and Iran intensified hostilities, including attacks on vessels attempting to transit the Strait of Hormuz and a strike on an oil facility in Kuwait over the weekend.

Treasuries fell across the curve on Monday, with the benchmark 10-year yield rising two basis points to 4.57%. The risk of inflationary pressures stemming from the conflict nonetheless came into focus as U.S. gasoline prices climbed back above the $4-a-gallon mark.

In Friday's trading session, Wall Street's major equity averages closed lower. Most members of the Magnificent Seven slid, with Meta Platforms (META) and Alphabet (GOOGL) falling over -2%. Also, chip stocks sank after Chinese startup Moonshot unveiled its Kimi K3 AI model, with Applied Materials (AMAT) sliding over -5% and KLA Corp. (KLAC) dropping more than -3%. In addition, Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) tumbled over -14% and was the top percentage loser on the S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 after the company left its full-year da Vinci procedure growth guidance unchanged, disappointing investors. On the bullish side, Travelers Cos. (TRV) climbed more than +9% and was the top percentage gainer on the S&P 500 and Dow after the property and casualty insurer posted better-than-expected Q2 net premiums written.

"As we enter earnings season, a market defined by modest selloffs and rapid recoveries suggests bulls remain in control, but they're waiting for an all-clear signal from earnings before pushing stocks to new highs," said Mark Hackett at Nationwide.

sentences.zh: Nationwide 的马克·哈克特 (Mark Hackett) 表示：“随着我们进入财报季节，由温和抛售和快速复苏所定义的市场表明多头仍处于控制之中，但他们正在等待财报发出全面明确的信号，然后再将股市推至新高。”

content_html_zh:
亚历山大·皮利宾科

MDT 2026 年 7 月 20 日星期一凌晨 4:32 阅读时间 9 分钟

9 月标准普尔 500 E-Mini 期货 (ESU26) 上涨 +0.30%，9 月纳斯达克 100 E-Mini 期货 (NQU26) 今天上午上涨 +0.59%，受到盈利丰厚的一周开始时芯片股温和反弹的提振。

芯片股在盘前交易中上涨，投资者在芯片股暴跌后逢低买入，将这家备受瞩目的集团推入熊市。 美光科技 (MU) 上涨超过 +4%，Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) 上涨超过 +2%，Marvell Technology (MRVL) 上涨约 +2%。

来自条形图的更多新闻

  • 阿里巴巴股票刚刚获得苹果公司最大的人工智能认可。 这可能会改变阿里巴巴的游戏规则。
  • 埃隆·马斯克表示，如果 SpaceX 实现其目标，“它将比地球其他地方更有价值”——尽管他也表示“金钱将不再重要”
  • 本周人工智能泡沫恐惧、收益和其他不容错过的内容
  • 厌倦了错过午间反转吗？ 免费的条形图简讯让您了解最新情况。 立即注册！

同样提振市场情绪的是，在伊朗表示仍在寻求外交解决方案并且已收到调解人的建议后，WTI 原油价格周一回吐了早些时候的涨幅并下跌。 在美国和伊朗加剧敌对行动后，油价最初上涨，其中包括周末对试图通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只的袭击以及对科威特石油设施的袭击。

周一国债全线下跌，基准 10 年期国债收益率上涨两个基点至 4.57%。 尽管如此，随着美国汽油价格回升至每加仑 4 美元以上，冲突引发的通胀压力风险仍成为人们关注的焦点。

周五交易时段，华尔街主要股指均线收低。 七巨头的大多数成员均出现下滑，其中 Meta Platforms (META) 和 Alphabet (GOOGL) 跌幅超过 -2%。 此外，在中国初创公司 Moonshot 推出 Kimi K3 AI 模型后，芯片股下跌，应用材料公司 (AMAT) 跌幅超过 -5%，KLA Corp. (KLAC) 跌幅超过 -3%。 此外，Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) 维持全年达芬奇手术增长指引不变，令投资者失望，该公司股价下跌超过-14%，成为标准普尔 500 指数和纳斯达克 100 指数跌幅最大的股票。 从看涨的角度来看，旅行者公司。 财产和意外伤害保险公司 (TRV) 上涨超过 9%，在标准普尔 500 指数和道琼斯指数中涨幅最大，此前这家财产和意外伤害保险公司公布了好于预期的第二季度净承保保费。

Nationwide 的马克·哈克特 (Mark Hackett) 表示：“随着我们进入财报季节，由温和抛售和快速复苏所定义的市场表明多头仍处于控制之中，但他们正在等待财报发出全面明确的信号，然后再将股市推至新高。”
